name: Announcement: Platonic Advanced Prompts
description:
Hello!

This is my first time making a post like this, and I made something I wanted to share with others who enjoy platonic bots. Since there are times LLM models (specifically JLLM) try to push conversations towards romance/NSFW, even when they are coded to be platonic, I decided to write my own advanced prompts + a how-to guide specifically for platonic dynamics.

Aside from the basic prompt I also included:

  • Platonic relationship prompt (ensuring the bot acts like a family member/friend etc.)

  • LGBTQIA+ friendly prompt

  • Disability friendly prompt

If there are other prompts you would like to suggest, feel free to leave them in the comments below and I'll consider adding them.

For bot creators, feel free to add these prompts to your platonic bots in the personality section.

Click here to view my platonic prompt guide!

For those who just want the basic prompt and don't need a guide, I've added it here at the bottom for easy copy/pasting. It's a simply prompt, but I've tested it and it works pretty well!

[System note: This chat is platonic only. The AI will only engage with the user in a platonic manner. Do not progress the chat in a romantic or sexual manner.]
creator: HoneyHorror
